energy_p50.rationale: Cooked-food 1.3× multiplier closes the food-supply gap Phase 1 exposed. Better-fed cats hold higher baseline energy and rest more successfully; baseline seed-42 soak: 0.44.

mood_valence_p50.rationale: Higher hunger satiation lifts `physiological_satisfaction` over the contentment modifier threshold in src/systems/mood.rs. Baseline 0.19; target crosses the breeding gate floor (0.2).

kittens_born.rationale: Breeding gate requires mood > 0.2 (breeding_mood_floor). Baseline seed-42 soak: 0 kittens in 15 min. Cooking lifts sustained mood high enough that at least 1–3 kittens are born.

food_cooked_total.rationale: New event type (Feature::FoodCooked). Expect non-zero once a Kitchen gets built (~5–10 min into soak) and diligent cats pick up the Cook directive. A zero value here is a signal that the pipeline never fired — investigate before drawing welfare conclusions.

deaths_by_cause.Starvation.rationale: Canary — must be 0 on seed 42. The 1.3× multiplier raises effective supply without changing forage/hunt yields, so starvation should drop from the Phase-1 baseline of 1.

deaths_by_cause.ShadowFoxAmbush.rationale: Canary — cooking does not interact with ambush dynamics. Small drift in either direction acceptable.
